generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving type mismatches or unresolved identifiers reported by the validator.
Prioritize repairs that adjust helper declarations to match expected expression types.
When validator diagnostics indicate scope issues, consider moving guarantees to the appropriate scope (type vs. implementation).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use only visible AADL features or `eq` helpers declared within the same annex.
Ensure that guarantee expressions have a valid type.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or dependencies not present in the AADL model.
Avoid placing guarantees in implementation scope when they should be at the type level.
Do not attempt to repair by modifying unrelated architecture.
